title: Assessor can log in and view submitted projects list
description: Verifies an assessor can authenticate with the dashboard password and see the submitted projects list.

steps.description: Navigate to /dashboard
Fill eltex2025 into the password field
Submit the login form
Verify the submitted projects list is displayed

title: Submit a completed project from review and see success confirmation
description: Verifies the customer can submit from the review step when all checklist items are complete and sees a success confirmation.

steps.description: Navigate to /?code=ELT20250005
Wait for the review step to be ready
Click the submit action on the review step
Verify a submission success confirmation screen is visible

title: Lookup phone and resume saved project step
description: Ensures a customer can enter a valid Spanish mobile number, submit lookup, and be redirected to their project where the saved current step is shown.

steps.description: Navigate to /
Fill a valid Spanish mobile number that is associated with a project into the phone number field
Submit the phone lookup
Verify the user is redirected into a project flow with a project code present in the page state
Verify the project flow displays a single current section to continue

title: Apply a drawn signature to all required representation documents and continue
description: Verifies the customer can add a signature, apply it to all required representation PDFs, and proceed to the next step.

steps.description: Navigate to /?code=ELT20250001
Wait for the representation signing step to be ready
Call window.__eltexFillTestSignature()
Click the continue action for representation signing
Verify the user advances past the representation signing step

title: Upload all required property documents and continue to province selection
description: Ensures a customer can upload identity document, IBI certificate, and electricity bill, confirm extraction review, and proceed to province selection.

steps.description: Navigate to /?code=ELT20250003
Upload an identity document front image
Confirm the AI-extracted identity fields review
Upload an IBI certificate document (photo or PDF)
Upload an electricity bill document with multiple pages
Click property-docs-continue-btn
Verify the province selection step is displayed

title: Complete the full 4-step energy certificate survey and reach review
description: Verifies the customer can complete all four survey steps and finish to reach the review step.

steps.description: Navigate to /?code=ELT20250004
Fill required fields for energy certificate step 1 with valid values
Click the next action for the energy certificate survey
Fill required fields for energy certificate step 2 with valid values
Click the next action for the energy certificate survey
Fill required fields for energy certificate step 3 with valid values
Click the next action for the energy certificate survey
Fill required fields for energy certificate step 4 with valid values
Click the confirm action to complete the energy certificate survey
Verify the user lands on the review step

title: Assessor can open a project detail view from the list
description: Verifies an assessor can open a project's detail view and see its documents and extracted data.

steps.description: Navigate to /dashboard
Fill eltex2025 into the password field
Submit the login form
Click the control to open a project detail view from the projects list
Verify the project detail modal is displayed
Verify uploaded assets and extracted data are displayed in the project detail view

title: Skip the energy certificate survey and land on review with skipped status
description: Verifies the customer can skip the energy certificate survey and proceed to review where the energy certificate is marked as skipped.

steps.description: Navigate to /?code=ELT20250004
Wait for the energy certificate step to be ready
Click the skip action for the energy certificate survey
Verify the user lands on the review step
Verify the energy certificate item is shown as skipped in the checklist

title: Fix an incomplete item from review and return ready to submit
description: Verifies the customer can leave review to fix an incomplete requirement and return to review with submission available.

steps.description: Navigate to /?code=ELT20250001
Wait for the representation signing step to be ready
Click the defer signing action
Navigate to /?code=ELT20250005
Wait for the review step to be ready
Click the checklist item that indicates representation signing is incomplete
Wait for the representation signing step to be ready
Call window.__eltexFillTestSignature()
Click the continue action for representation signing
Verify the user returns to the review step with the submit action available

title: Assessor can download a project ZIP archive from project detail
description: Verifies an assessor can download the ZIP archive for a project from the project detail view.

steps.description: Navigate to /dashboard
Fill eltex2025 into the password field
Submit the login form
Click the control to open a project detail view from the projects list
Click the control to download the project ZIP archive
Verify a ZIP file download is initiated

title: Defer representation signing and proceed without applying signatures
description: Verifies the customer can defer signing and still continue to the next step without completing signatures.

steps.description: Navigate to /?code=ELT20250001
Wait for the representation signing step to be ready
Click the defer signing action
Verify the user advances past the representation signing step

title: Assessor can export the projects list as CSV
description: Verifies an assessor can export the project list to a CSV file from the dashboard.

steps.description: Navigate to /dashboard
Fill eltex2025 into the password field
Submit the login form
Click the control to export the project list as CSV
Verify a CSV file download is initiated

title: Review checklist gating: submission is not available when an item is incomplete
description: Verifies the review step prevents submission when required checklist items are incomplete.

steps.description: Navigate to /?code=ELT20250004
Wait for the energy certificate step to be ready
Click the next action for the energy certificate survey
Click the back action for the energy certificate survey
Click the skip action for the energy certificate survey
Wait for the review step to be ready
Verify the submit action is not available on the review step

title: Navigate back within the energy certificate survey and retain entered progress
description: Verifies the customer can go back to a previous survey step to adjust entries and still proceed forward.

steps.description: Navigate to /?code=ELT20250004
Fill required fields for energy certificate step 1 with valid values
Click the next action for the energy certificate survey
Fill required fields for energy certificate step 2 with valid values
Click the next action for the energy certificate survey
Click the back action for the energy certificate survey
Click the next action for the energy certificate survey
Verify the user is back on energy certificate step 3

title: Require DNI back side when front-only is detected
description: Ensures uploading a front-only DNI triggers a prompt requiring the back side and allows continuing only after the back is provided and confirmed.

steps.description: Navigate to /?code=ELT20250003
Upload an identity document front image that the app detects as front-only
Verify a prompt is visible indicating the back side is required
Upload an identity document back image
Confirm the identity extraction review
Verify the flow allows continuing past the identity document requirement

title: Prevent continuing representation signing until a signature is provided
description: Verifies the customer cannot proceed with representation signing until a signature is present.

steps.description: Navigate to /?code=ELT20250001
Wait for the representation signing step to be ready
Click the continue action for representation signing
Verify the user remains on the representation signing step
Verify a signature-required validation indicator is visible

title: Assessor can download an individual asset from project detail
description: Verifies an assessor can download an individual uploaded file from within a project's detail view.

steps.description: Navigate to /dashboard
Fill eltex2025 into the password field
Submit the login form
Click the control to open a project detail view from the projects list
Scroll to the assets list within the project detail view
Click the control to download an individual asset
Verify a file download is initiated

title: Assessor can log out and return to the login screen
description: Verifies an assessor can end their session and is returned to the dashboard login screen.

steps.description: Navigate to /dashboard
Fill eltex2025 into the password field
Submit the login form
Click the control to log out
Verify the dashboard login screen is displayed

title: Use back navigation from representation signing to return to the previous step
description: Verifies the customer can go back from representation signing to the prior step to correct information and the app navigates accordingly.

steps.description: Navigate to /?code=ELT20250001
Wait for the representation signing step to be ready
Click the back action for representation signing
Verify the user lands on the previous step before representation signing

title: Block continuing when required property documents are incomplete
description: Ensures the customer cannot proceed to the next step until the required property documents are provided.

steps.description: Navigate to /?code=ELT20250003
Upload an identity document front image
Confirm the AI-extracted identity fields review
Click property-docs-continue-btn
Verify the app remains on the property documents step
Verify a validation error is visible indicating missing required documents

title: Prevent advancing energy certificate steps when required fields are missing
description: Verifies the customer cannot proceed to the next survey step without completing required fields.

steps.description: Navigate to /?code=ELT20250004
Click the next action for the energy certificate survey
Verify the user remains on the current energy certificate step
Verify required-field validation errors are visible

title: Signature pad reflects signature state after injecting a test signature
description: Verifies the signature pad updates to a signed state after a test signature is injected.

steps.description: Navigate to /?code=ELT20250001
Wait for the representation signing step to be ready
Call window.__eltexFillTestSignature()
Verify the signature canvas indicates a signature is present

title: Assessor can open the in-browser view for an asset
description: Verifies an assessor can open the view action for an asset and the UI indicates the asset was opened for viewing.

steps.description: Navigate to /dashboard
Fill eltex2025 into the password field
Submit the login form
Click the control to open a project detail view from the projects list
Scroll to the assets list within the project detail view
Click the control to view an individual asset
Verify the application indicates an asset view was opened

title: Show not-found error when phone is not associated with a project
description: Ensures a customer entering a non-matching mobile number sees a not-found error and is not redirected into a project.

steps.description: Navigate to /
Fill a valid Spanish mobile number that is not associated with any project into the phone number field
Submit the phone lookup
Verify a phone not found error message is visible
Verify the user remains on the phone entry step
